commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=47e8159754d3b95ff675f7c5e3a7e7d924161e06)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a numeric-segment comparator in `src/agents/sessions/model-resolver.ts` and uses it for alias and dated-version sorting.

PR surface: Source +18. Total +18 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows `parseModelPattern("opus", [claude-opus-4-9, claude-opus-4-10])` reaches current main's plain descending `localeCompare` and would select the older lexicographic id.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human-only follow-up is needed because the contributor must repair the comparator/lint issues and provide real resolver proof before automation or merge can proceed.

target.title: fix(model-resolver): use numeric-aware version comparison for model alias resolution
target.author: zw-xysk

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
